title: Sticky top section + phone mockup for splash/login screens

requirements.summary: Make the entire top section of the TaskQueue page sticky, including brand header, tab bar, workload filter chips, and search bar, while the case list scrolls independently beneath it
acceptanceCriteria: The brand header (TaskQueueHeader) does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The tab bar (TaskQueueTabs) does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The workload filter chips row does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The search bar does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The case list (CaseCards) scrolls independently beneath the sticky section.
No layout overlap or z-index clash between the sticky section and the scrolling list.

file_operations.description: Restructure the TaskQueue page layout to create a sticky top section containing TaskQueueHeader, TaskQueueTabs (with filter chips and search bar passed as content), and ensure the case list scrolls independently. Apply position:sticky to the top section container with appropriate z-index. Adjust the main container to use flexbox with overflow handling so the sticky section remains fixed while CaseCards scroll below.

requirements.summary: Wrap the Splash and Login pages inside the PhoneMockup component so they render within a phone frame by default, while TaskQueue and CaseDetail pages remain full-width
acceptanceCriteria: The Splash page (/) is wrapped inside PhoneMockup and renders centered within the phone frame on desktop viewport.
The Login page (/login) is wrapped inside PhoneMockup and renders centered within the phone frame on desktop viewport.
The animated crosshair/logo animation on the Splash page plays correctly inside the phone frame.
The Login form on the Login page is fully usable (inputs, button) inside the phone frame.
The TaskQueue (/tasks) and CaseDetail (/case/$caseId) pages are NOT wrapped in PhoneMockup and continue to render as before.
The page background outside the phone frame is visually distinct (e.g., neutral/dark) to emphasise the mockup.

file_operations.description: Wrap the entire splash screen content (animated crosshair logo, tagline, feature pills) inside the existing PhoneMockup component located at frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx. Import PhoneMockup and enclose the splash content as children. Ensure the animation (keyframes defined in frontend/src/index.css) plays correctly within the phone frame. Add a centered layout wrapper outside the PhoneMockup with a neutral or dark background to emphasise the phone frame on desktop viewports.

Wrap the entire login form content (email/password inputs, submit button) inside the existing PhoneMockup component located at frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx. Import PhoneMockup and enclose the login form as children. Ensure all form interactions remain fully functional inside the phone frame. Add a centered layout wrapper outside the PhoneMockup with a neutral or dark background to emphasise the phone frame on desktop viewports.
